name: camarade
description: Turn rough coding requests into repository-aware, execution-ready tasks.

interface.longDescription: Select Camarade in the composer, write the task naturally, and submit. Camarade cleans up the request, compiles relevant repository context, and chooses a direct, planned, or persistent workflow without overriding user-pinned Codex settings.
defaultPrompt: Improve this coding request and carry it out.
Turn this rough idea into a concrete implementation plan.
Compile the right repository context for this task.
